channel.title: How to install the frontity-org-theme
channel.description:
Hello,
I would like to install the frontity-org-theme and use it as a starter, I've downloaded the full site source from https://github.com/frontity/frontity.org and build without problem. But if I try to modify settings to point to my own wordpress site, I get a lot of errors. Anyone has some guidelines about how to make this work ?.
Thank you

item.title: How to install the frontity-org-theme
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @info4

Welcome to the community. We’re delighted that you’re interesting in trying Frontity.

Could you let us know what errors you are getting. Also if you can provide a link to a repo so that we can take a look at your code then that would be helpful.

Read full topic

item.title: How to install the frontity-org-theme
item.dc:creator: info4
item.description:
Hello,

I would like to install the frontity-org-theme and use it as a starter, I’ve downloaded the full site source from https://github.com/frontity/frontity.org and build without problem.
But if I try to modify settings to point to my own wordpress site, I get a lot of errors.
Anyone has some guidelines about how to make this work ?.

Thank you

Read full topic
